## Bright-line checklist

- [ ] If this PR adds a component, action, or new rendering behavior in any renderer, the schema in `packages/schema/` has been updated to reflect it.
- [ ] If this PR adds a component, action, or new rendering behavior, the conformance corpus in `packages/conformance/` includes at least one new case for it.
- [ ] If this PR introduces a new third-party runtime dependency in any package, the rationale has been discussed in an issue or in this PR description (see [ADR-0005](../docs/adr/0005-minimize-third-party-dependencies.md)).
